rationale: The pair is not an obvious incidental mention: the citing paper’s core contribution is measuring consumer certainty in language, and the cited paper is a prior JMR study on how certainty in consumer communications behaves and decays. Given this strong construct-level overlap and a confirmed DOI match (10.1509/jmr.09.0018), the cited work could plausibly be a foundational theory/mechanism source rather than a generic background citation.
